ikigai over WebTransport — this page does not host the kernel. It opens a WebTransport (HTTP/3 / QUIC) connection to a kernel server, sends one compose urn:data:page request as ikigai-wire bytes (the same protocol ikigai-ipc/ikigai-quic speak), and the server composes the page remotely and streams the HTML back. Only the wire codec runs in WASM here — the kernel is on the other end.

Run cargo run --bin ikigai-net-server, paste the printed cert hash, and connect (or open this page with #cert=<hash>):
